# LLMs Usage Policy for PrivateJetBodrum
# Version: 1.0 — Updated for Google AI Search, OpenAI GPTBot, Anthropic Claude, Perplexity, Bing AI, Apple Intelligence

This website allows large language models (LLMs) and AI crawlers to access and use its publicly available content for:
- Search indexing and ranking
- AI-powered summaries and answers
- Knowledge extraction and retrieval
- Citation-based responses
- Non-commercial research

## Allowed Uses
- Crawling and indexing all publicly accessible pages
- Using content for AI search results and answer generation
- Displaying short excerpts, summaries, and structured data
- Linking back to our pages as the canonical source
- Using metadata (titles, descriptions, schema, OG/Twitter tags)

## Disallowed Uses
- Training proprietary or commercial foundation models
- Storing or redistributing private, user-submitted, or non-public data
- Bulk dataset creation or offline archiving
- Any use that violates our Terms of Service or applicable laws
- Removing attribution or canonical references

## Required Conditions
- All AI systems must respect robots.txt directives
- All citations must reference: https://privatejetbodrum.vercel.app
- Content must not be modified in a misleading or harmful way
- No caching beyond what is required for search indexing

## AI Crawler-Specific Policies

### OpenAI — GPTBot
User-agent: GPTBot
Allow: /
Disallow: /private/

### Anthropic — ClaudeBot
User-agent: ClaudeBot
Allow: /
Disallow: /private/

### Perplexity — PPLXBot
User-agent: PPLXBot
Allow: /
Disallow: /private/

### Bing AI / Microsoft
User-agent: Bingbot
Allow: /

### Google AI Search
User-agent: Google-Extended
Allow: /

### Apple Intelligence
User-agent: Applebot
Allow: /

## Contact
For permissions, licensing, or questions, visit:
https://privatejetbodrum.vercel.app
